sidebar.deleteSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete session "{{label}}"?

gateway.notRunningDesc: The OpenClaw Gateway needs to be running to use this feature. It will start automatically, or you can start it from Settings.

login.title: Sign in to 极智
login.subtitle: Use Xiaojiu sign-in first for the smoothest path. After approval in your browser, you will return here automatically.
login.heroTitle: Start with the fastest way into MimiClaw
login.featureFast: Return to the app automatically after browser approval
login.oauthPrimaryTitle: Use Xiaojiu sign-in to continue quickly
login.secondaryHint: If Xiaojiu sign-in is not available in your current environment, expand the traditional form below.
login.passwordOptionHint: Hidden by default to keep the recommended path front and center.
login.error: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
login.timeout: The login request timed out. Please try again.
login.oauthHint: MimiClaw will open the Xiaojiu authorization page in your browser and finish sign-in here automatically.
login.oauthBrowserOpened: The Xiaojiu sign-in page is open in your browser. Finish authorization there and the app will continue automatically.
login.oauthError: Xiaojiu sign-in failed. Please try again.
login.oauthStartTimeout: Opening Xiaojiu sign-in timed out. Please try again.
login.characterIdle: Move your cursor around and the companions will follow along.
login.characterUsername: Start typing your username and everyone leans in.
login.characterSecret: While you type a hidden password, they politely look away.
login.characterVisible: Reveal the password and the purple one gets curious.

DragUpload.dragDesc: Drag and drop files here to upload multiple images.
DragUpload.dragFileDesc: Drag and drop images and files here to upload multiple images and files.

browserUse.navigationBlocked: Navigation blocked: URL not in allowlist
